title: 3) Count treatment sessions
text:
~ !  ~
60
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
The practitioner should know where the treatment is going. Always draw the big picture
ﬁrst. He/she should be able to assess the treatment result in the perspective of the big
picture. Recognizing that the result is not good enough at the end of the session is too late for
patient and for practitioner.
5C - Care
